description: Dispatch-level skill discovery registry for orchestrated task packs.

dispatch_skills.name: governance-orchestrator-skill
dispatch_skills.trigger: 统一调度、校验、返工收敛与 Final Gate 裁决

dispatch_skills.name: seed-gate-validator-skill
dispatch_skills.trigger: 批次收口前 strict gate 校验

dispatch_skills.name: task-pack-writer-skill
dispatch_skills.trigger: 新批次任务包生成/改版

dispatch_skills.name: experience-template-retriever-skill
dispatch_skills.trigger: 按 IssueKey/FixKind 复用经验模板

dispatch_skills.name: trinity-dispatch-orchestrator-skill
dispatch_skills.trigger: 兼容层（建议迁移到 governance-orchestrator-skill）

dispatch_skills.name: GOVERNANCE_PROTOCOL
dispatch_skills.trigger: 高风险操作（Shell/File/DB/Network）前强制治理与审计
